name: Lord of the Wilds
short_description: Lord of the Wilds is a strategy game where you build and defend your territory in a wild land. Gather resources, train armies, and face threats from rival lords, orcs, and undead. Strategize to conquer the wilderness.
detailed_description:
In the wild lands, you are the last hope.

Lord of the Wilds is a game that combines strategy, construction, and survival elements. You will play as a exiled noble, starting from scratch to rebuild your domain in a war-torn wilderness, fending off threats from all sides, and ultimately becoming the ruler of this land.

Start from scratch, build a prosperous territory:

You begin in a land of ruins, surrounded by barren soil and crumbling remnants of the past. To survive, you must gather resources by hand and construct essential infrastructure. Lumber mills provide wood, mines allow you to extract precious ores, and farms become your source of food. As resources accumulate, you can plan the layout of your domain, build houses to attract settlers, establish barracks to train soldiers, and even open markets to boost economic prosperity. Every step requires careful calculation, as resource scarcity and harsh environmental conditions will constantly test your decision-making skills.

Fend off enemies, protect your people:

Dangers lurk everywhere in the wilderness. Rival lords eye your territory, seeking to annex it; orc tribes emerge from the mountains, burning and pillaging; undead legions awaken in the night, bringing death and terror. To survive, you must train soldiers and build a powerful army. Archers, cavalry, and infantry each have their strengths and weaknesses, and you must devise tactics based on your enemies' characteristics. At the same time, construct sturdy walls and towering arrow towers to defend against enemy attacks. Every battle is crucial—failure could mean the destruction of your domain, while victory will earn you precious resources and time.

Seek mystical powers, turn the tide of battle:

Deep within the wilderness lies ancient power. By building mage towers, you can recruit powerful wizards to study devastating spells. Fireballs can incinerate groups of enemies, ice magic can slow enemy advances, and summoning spells can bring powerful allies to your side. Meanwhile, constructing churches allows you to harness religious power. Devout priests can heal wounded soldiers, pray for divine blessings to boost army morale, and even summon angels to the battlefield. The combination of magic and faith will become the key to overcoming formidable foes.

Are you ready to face the challenge?

In Lord of the Wilds, you will face multiple challenges in resource management, territory planning, army command, and strategic decision-making. Every choice you make will shape your destiny. Will you become a benevolent ruler or a ruthless conqueror? Will you rely on technology and force, or will you turn to magic and faith? The choice is yours.

The Lord of the Wilds awaits your rise!

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Japanese, Traditional Chinese, Korean
*languages with full audio support
